author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered: Multi-threaded backward engine (backward_parallel) with ready-queue parallelism.

Architecture:
1. Shared ready queue (Mutex<VecDeque>) + Condvar for worker wakeup
2. Atomic in-degree counters for lock-free decrement
3. Mutex<HashMap> for gradient accumulation with GPU-native add_f32
4. N worker threads (configurable) pull ready nodes, call backward, push newly-ready inputs
5. Falls back to sequential for graphs < 8 nodes
6. accumulate_non_leaf_grad_locked helper for thread-safe gradient accumulation

Also fixed ONNX export for new FusedLinearActivation/FusedAttention variants.
810 core + 6 integration tests pass.
